subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the Temple of Fidelity hath trembled, and steadfastness hath wavered upon the branches of the Divine Lote-Tree by reason of that which hath befallen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه اضطرب هیکل الوفاء و  ...  البقاء علی افنان سدرة المنتهی بما ورد علی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @wisdom [hikmat], @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
